h3.t-if: report_name == 'Invoice' and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'

div.t-attf-class: #{'col-4 pr-4 ks_invoice' if report_name in [ 'Picking Slip'] else 'col-4 pt-3 pr-4 ks_invoice'}
#{'ks_total pt-3' if report_name in [ 'Sales', 'Purchase Order', 'Invoice','Bill'] else 'ks_total'}

h4.t-if: report_name in ['Sales', 'Purchase Order', 'Invoice','Bill'] and not res_config.ks_show_taxes

span.class: round_shape d-block text-center ks_payment_history_text_color ks_payment_history_bckgrnd_color ks_payment_history_text_size

div.t-attf-class: #{'col-5 offset-3' if report_name in ['Invoice','Bill'] else 'col-5 offset-7'}

tr.t-if: report_name not in ['Payment Receipts'] and res_config.ks_show_taxes

div.p: Five Thousands Five Hundred Fourty Five dollar only

div.span: All Products could not be reversed. Click on the “Check Availability” button to try to reserve products

div.p: Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text.

div.span: Please use following communication for your payment INV/2021/01/0001

h3.t-if: report_name == 'Invoice' and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'

div.t-if: report_name != 'Picking Slip' and report_name != 'Payment Receipts' and report_name != 'Purchase Order'

div.t-attf-class: #{'row border-top border-bottom py-2' if report_name=='Picking Slip' else 'row border-top py-2'}
#{'col-4 pr-4 ks_invoice' if report_name in ['Delivery Note', 'Picking Slip'] else 'col-4 pt-3 pr-4 ks_invoice'}
div.t-if: report_name not in['Payment Receipts', 'Sales','Purchase Order','Purchase RFQ','Bill']

div.t-attf-class: #{'col-4 ks_invoice text-left' if report_name=='' else 'col-4 offset-4 pt-3 ks_invoice text-left'}

div.t-if: report_name != 'Purchase RFQ' and report_name != 'Picking Slip' and report_name != 'Payment Receipts' and report_name != 'Purchase Order' and report_name != 'Sales'

div.t-attf-class: #{'col-5 offset-3' if report_name in ['Invoice','Bill'] else 'col-6 offset-6'}

tr.t-if: report_name not in ['Payment Receipts'] and res_config.ks_show_taxes

div.t-attf-class: #{'col-7 text-right ks_amount_in_words' if report_name in ['Invoice','Bill'] else 'col-12 text-right ks_amount_in_words'}

#{'col-12' if report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Purchase Order','Purchase RFQ'] else 'col-7'}
#{'col-6 ks_invoice border-right ' if report_name=='Delivery Note' else 'col-5 py-3 ks_invoice'}

template.p:
Attn: Metro Group
116 Changi Road, #04-03 WIS@Changi Singapore 419718

Attn: Metro Group
Address: 116 Changi Road, #04-03 WIS@Changi, Singapore, 419718

t.t-if: res_config.company_id.street2 or res_config.company_id.city or res_config.company_id.zip or res_config.company_id.state_id or res_config.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
res_config.company_id.city or res_config.company_id.zip or res_config.company_id.state_id or res_config.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

res_config.company_id.zip or res_config.company_id.state_id or res_config.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
